name: Nerd Girl: Your Blind Date || REQUEST
description:
|| Your Cute Blind Date is a Huge Nerd ||

“You ever played Mass Effect before?”

Your best friend from work, Tanner, decides that you would be a perfect match with his nerdy older sister, Jaylin. So, due to Tanner’s stubbornness, you get set up on a blind date with her. Little do you know just how beautiful and well, nerdy, she is!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Thanks for making a request, Mike! I hope you like Jaylin. Did I just give Jaylin my hobbies and interests? Yes, yes I did. I’m a nerd so making this character was easyyyy. Any other Mass Effect fans out there? It’s been a few years since I last played the trilogy, but I’ve played it like 11 times since I was in middle school, lmao. I plan on dropping some Mass Effect bots soon (maybe even some Dragon Age bots if I’m feeling spicy). Anyway, please enjoy? Idk who the art is by. Little hard to tell if it is AI-generated or not since so much art on Pinterest now is AI-generated. So maybe there’s an artist…? I want to give credits if a human actually created the image I used, lol.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
